office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A long-serving incumbent with a legislative record on climate, labor, safety, and housing faces a veteran and technology leader whose approved sources contain no detailed platform.

candidates.summary: Doglio is an eight-year state representative and former advocate with a record spanning climate, labor, housing, and progressive social policy.
highlights: Supports climate policy, housing funding, labor protections, and a social safety net [S1]
Supports reproductive rights, domestic-violence protections, and gun laws [S1]
Reports passing legislation across climate, labor, safety, and housing [S1]

spending.basis: She supports housing funding, education, and a social safety net as public investments.

housing.basis: She supports housing funding and reports passing housing legislation.

climate.basis: She supports climate policy and reports passing climate legislation after prior climate advocacy.

experience.basis: She is an eight-year incumbent with a reported legislative record across several policy areas.

social.basis: She explicitly supports reproductive rights and has prior reproductive-rights advocacy experience.

candidates.summary: Hewett is an Air Force veteran, engineer, and technology-team leader whose approved sources provide no detailed policy platform.
highlights: Brings military, engineering, and technology-team leadership experience [S1]
The approved sources provide no detailed policy platform [S1]

experience.basis: He brings non-government professional experience with no documented elected or institutional record.
